div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

title.value: US Veterans Health Administration FHIR Map Set Implementation Guide

description.value: This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case AllergyIntolerance
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case Appointment
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case Condition, Variation Encounter diagnosis
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case Condition, Variation Problem
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case Diagnostic Report for Lab, ResourceType DiagnosticReport

name.value: Diagnostic Report for Lab: Chem, hem, tox, ria, ser {DiagnosticReport}

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case Diagnostic Report for Lab: Chem, hem, tox, ria, ser, ResourceType DiagnosticReport

name.value: Diagnostic Report for Lab: Surgical Pathology {DiagnosticReport}

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for Use Case Diagnostic Report for Lab: Surgical Pathology, ResourceType DiagnosticReport
